name: pantheon
description: One install, everything: 13 mythic disciplines + dashboard/doctor/forge that auto-route from plain language and LEARN what you accept; retrieval-augmented memory that recalls past lessons by itself; a verification gate that blocks fake 'done' (failing tests / TODO stubs / unverified code); receipts + TUI dashboard; budget caps (warn/ask/block); team packs; custom-discipline forging; cross-agent export; a rich statusline HUD. PLUS 172 merged skills under pantheon-native names — 188 total (sources attributed, licenses retained, old→new map in CREDITS.md). Zero dependencies, fail-silent hooks, configurable full/economy/quiet.
